title: Data Questions, Displays, Summaries, and Responsible Claims · Worked Case: Data Types Sampling
summary: Investigate service wait times and satisfaction while protecting the context behind the data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg data types sampling increment in a community-service data story. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify variables and evaluate whether a sample can represent the target population.
Formulate a statistical question that anticipates variability and names a population.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
